content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

No findings. The working tree diff was empty, so I reviewed the committed e8p range (24ad76b..HEAD), read the key flow/workflow files end-to-end, and checked the follow-up wiring in routing, run-record, requirements, CLI, and conformance code. Targeted verification passed, including `cargo test minimal_flow --features test-stub -- --nocapture`, `cargo test --features test-stub flow_ -- --nocapture`, `cargo test --features test-stub label_vocabulary_contains_all_built_in_flow_labels -- --nocapture`, and `cargo test --features test-stub built_in_recommended_flows -- --nocapture`.

## Amendments

None.
